titleStmt.title: INDIAN STATES AND CROP ENTITIES REPORT . ANDHRA PRADESH has Kharif crop: PADDY (RICE)has Kharif crop: COTTONhas Kharif crop: BAJRA (PEARL MILLET)has Kharif crop: JOWAR (SORGHUM)has Kharif crop: MAIZEhas Kharif crop: GROUNDNUThas Kharif crop: RED GRAM (TUR/ARHAR)has Kharif crop: GREEN GRAM (MOONG)has Kharif crop: BLACK GRAM (URAD)has Kharif crop: SUGARCANEhas Kharif crop: SOYBEANhas Rabi crop: WHEAT (limited areas)has Rabi crop: CHICKPEA (GRAM)has Rabi crop: SUNFLOWERhas Rabi crop: SAFFLOWERhas Rabi crop: LINSEEDhas Rabi crop: BARLEYhas Rabi crop: MAIZEhas Zaid crop: WATERMELONhas Zaid crop: MUSKMELONhas Zaid crop: CUCUMBERhas Zaid crop: RIDGE GOURD (TORI)has Zaid crop: BITTER GOURDhas Zaid crop: PUMPKINhas Commercial/Plantation crop: TOBACCO -Guntur district is famoushas Commercial/Plantation crop: SUGARCANEhas Commercial/Plantation crop: COTTONhas Commercial/Plantation crop: CHILLIES -Especially from Gunturhas Commercial/Plantation crop: OILSEEDS, Groundnut, Sunflowerhas Commercial/Plantation crop: FRUITS -Mango (Banganapalle), Banana, Papayahas Commercial/Plantation crop: SPICES -Turmeric, Gingerhas Commercial/Plantation crop: CASHEW NUT
